title: Aehr Test Systems Reports Fiscal 2025 Q1 Results and Reaffirms Full-Year Guidance
text: Aehr Test Systems reported fiscal 2025 Q1 financial results, demonstrating recovery from the prior year's slowdown. Net revenue increased year-over-year, supported by strong demand for silicon carbide and early data center applications. The company reported non-GAAP net income, marking a return to profitability. Bookings remained solid, reflecting continued customer interest in wafer-level and package-level burn-in solutions. The company reaffirmed full-year fiscal 2025 guidance, projecting continued revenue growth and improved profitability. Management highlighted growing demand across multiple markets including electric vehicle silicon carbide applications and emerging AI-related semiconductor testing needs.
